title: chore(deps): update typescript-eslint monorepo to v1.13.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.12.0` -> `1.13.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@typescript-eslint%2feslint-plugin/1.12.0/1.13.0) |
| [@typescript-eslint/parser](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.12.0` -> `1.13.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@typescript-eslint%2fparser/1.12.0/1.13.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint</summary>

### [`v1.13.0`](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1130httpsgithubcomtypescript-eslinttypescript-eslintcomparev1120v1130-2019-07-21)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/compare/v1.12.0...v1.13.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   Correct `@types/json-schema` dependency ([#​675](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/675)) ([a5398ce](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/a5398ce))
-   **eslint-plugin:** remove imports from typescript-estree ([#​706](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/706)) ([ceb2d32](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/ceb2d32)), closes [#​705](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/705)
-   **eslint-plugin:** undo breaking changes to recommended config ([93f72e3](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/93f72e3))
-   **utils:** move `typescript` from peer dep to dev dep ([#​712](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/712)) ([f949355](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/f949355))
-   **utils:** RuleTester should not require a parser ([#​713](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/713)) ([158a417](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/158a417))

##### Features

-   **eslint-plugin:** add new rule no-misused-promises ([#​612](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/612)) ([28a131d](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/28a131d))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add new rule require-await ([#​674](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/674)) ([807bc2d](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/807bc2d))

</details>
